completed_tasks.name: Generic comparisons and archived anchor locks
Fresh v1.6 proof bundle generation and paper-grade report hardening
completed_tasks.progress: Fresh `v1.6-standard` and `v1.6-showcase` campaigns were rerun and inspected. Multiple proof-bundle dry runs exposed report-layer issues in `src/eml_symbolic_regression/campaign.py`, which are now fixed and covered by `tests/test_campaign.py`. The final full `proof-campaign` rerun completed from the latest code state, and `artifacts/proof/v1.6` is internally consistent: manifest campaign counts match aggregate counts, pure-blind threshold prose reports 2/18 threshold-eligible pure blind recoveries plus 1 repaired candidate, proof-basin reports 9/9 same-AST perturbed-tree returns, and anchor locks cover the five current campaigns plus v1.5/v1.4 anchors.

completed_tasks.name: Run the full authoritative v1.6 proof bundle from the final code state
Verify regenerated `proof-shallow`, `proof-basin`, and top-level `proof-report.md` against aggregate counts and threshold rows

remaining_tasks.name: Start the paper package and publication evidence milestone

decisions.decision: Treat the fresh v1.6 paper bundle as a post-phase follow-up rather than silently trusting the first proof-campaign run.
decisions.rationale: The first completed proof bundle exposed report inaccuracies that did not affect core aggregates but would weaken publication-grade reporting if left uncorrected.

decisions.decision: Make `campaign.py` report generation regime-aware and evidence-class-aware before trusting any fresh proof output.
decisions.rationale: Dry-run inspection showed three real failures: blind-only proof reports mentioning warm-start evidence, perturbed-tree same-AST returns being dropped from campaign-level counts, and pure-blind report prose overstating threshold-eligible recoveries by counting repaired candidates.

decisions.decision: Use an isolated `proof-shallow-pure-blind` rerun as the gating canary before attempting another full proof-campaign rerun.
decisions.rationale: That suite exposed every report-layer issue fastest and now provides a verified reference point for the final full rerun.

decisions.decision: Treat `artifacts/proof/v1.6` as authoritative after the final full rerun completed from the latest code state.
decisions.rationale: Fresh report mtimes, aggregate-to-manifest checks, proof-shallow threshold rows, proof-basin same-AST counts, and anchor-lock coverage all passed after fixing the final pure-blind pluralization defect.

next_action: Start the next milestone for the EML paper package and publication evidence.
context_notes: Safe pause state: no proof-campaign or pytest processes are running. The final full proof bundle completed at 2026-04-16T16:24Z. Focused tests passed (`python -m pytest tests/test_campaign.py tests/test_proof_campaign.py -q`: 20 passed). Final checks verified fresh mtimes for `proof-shallow-pure-blind`, `proof-shallow`, `proof-basin`, `proof-depth-curve`, `proof-campaign.json`, and `proof-report.md`; manifest counts/thresholds match each campaign aggregate; pure-blind report text says 2 threshold-eligible pure blind recoveries plus 1 repaired candidate; proof-basin report says 9/9 same-AST perturbed-tree returns; anchor locks contain five current campaign locks plus v1.5, v1.4-standard, and v1.4-showcase anchor locks. Milestone v1.6 has been archived to `.planning/milestones/v1.6-*`; active ROADMAP now has no active phases and recommends a paper package milestone.
